connector_probe.detail: No Moneybird connector wired for synthetic. connectors.json has only ga4-demo. Finance module is not installed (identity.json modules_installed=[]). fin.ledger.list cannot be probed.

identity_binding.detail: Finance Stewart not bound to a read-only bookkeeping connector for synthetic; finance module not installed.

notes: Blocking gate (CAP-FIN-ONBOARDING-COMPLETENESS, 🔴). Founder-view tabs will not render until L1 passes. Two remediation paths: (1) operator installs Finance module for synthetic + wires a read-only bookkeeping connector; (2) Genus Agent owns connector wiring/health. Design note for Sage: synthetic's finance area is wired to Stripe test mode, but Finance module v1 L1 probe expects Moneybird — module/connector mismatch for this fixture BU.
